CREATE TABLE double_precision_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE PRECISION);
SELECT id FROM double_precision_test WHERE value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM double_precision_test);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM double_precision_test WHERE value BETWEEN -1.0 AND 1.0;
SELECT id, value * 2 FROM double_precision_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM double_precision_test WHERE value < 0);
CREATE TABLE double_precision_aggregate (val1 DOUBLE PRECISION, val2 DOUBLE PRECISION);
SELECT t1.id, t1.value + t2.val1 AS combined_value FROM double_precision_test t1 JOIN double_precision_aggregate t2 ON t1.id = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT ROUND(value, 2) FROM double_precision_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value DESC;
